joke: I will not make age an issue of this campaign. I am not going to exploit, for political purposes, my opponent's youth and inexperience.
setup: What did Ronald Reagan say about age during a 1984 presidential debate with Walter Mondale?

joke: They say hard work never hurt anybody, but I figure why take the chance.
Recession is when your neighbor loses his job. Depression is when you lose yours. And recovery is when Jimmy Carter loses his.
I have left orders to be awakened at any time in case of national emergency, even if I'm in a cabinet meeting.
I have wondered at times what the Ten Commandments would have looked like if Moses had run them through the US Congress.
When Chuck Norris slices onions, the onions cry.
Chuck Norris can divide by zero.
Chuck Norris counted to infinity. Twice.
Chuck Norris can slam a revolving door.
